text:
is a Japanese voice actor. He formerly worked for Haikyou and is now the head of Atomic Monkey. He is considered very versatile in his industry and has portrayed a wide variety of characters, ranging from comical to dramatic. Very often, the characters he voiced have very comical sides to their seriousness, such as Sagara Sousuke in the Full Metal Panic series, Kenichi Shirahama in Shijou Saikyou no Deshi Kenichi, and Toji Suzuhara in Neon Genesis Evangelion.

A selection of other roles voiced by Tomokazu Seki

2x2 Shinobuden (aka Ninja Nonsense) as Sasuke

Angelic Layer as Masaharu Ogata

Cardcaptor Sakura as Touya Kinamoto

Chobits as Hiromu Shinbo

Coyote Ragtime Show as Katana

Doraemon as Suneo Honekawa

Fate/Stay Night as Gilgamesh

Full Metal Panic (and Fumoffu and TSR) as Sosuke Sagara

Futakoi Alternative as Rentarou Futaba

Gravitation (OVA and series) as Shuichi Shindou

G-Gundam as Domon Kasshu

Genshiken as Soichiro Tanaka

Gundam Seed (and Seed Destiny) as Yzak Joule

Great Teacher Onizuka as Kunio Murai

Kanon (original and remake) as Jun Kitagawa

Last Exile as Ethan

Martian Successor Nadesico as Gai Daigoji and Tsukumo Shiratori

Maze as Maze (male)

My HiMe as Yuuichi Tate

Persona 4 as Kanji

Pretty Cure as Meple

Those Who Hunt Elves as Junpei

Vision of Escaflowne As Van Fanel

Yo-Kai Watch as Whisper

You're under Arrest as Shouji Toukairin

and many others...

Notes

In addition to being "hot-headed" in his voice roles, Seki is a Gunpla (Gundam plastic models) fanatic early on since childhood that he's often cast in mecha anime shows, including Gundam.
However Seki can be very versatile, refusing to be pigeonholed by performing very different roles, even as a villain.
Apart from voice acting, Seki is also a chairman of a stage troupe company, thus also spending time at theatre.
Very often, the characters he voiced have very comical sides to their seriousness, such as Toji Suzuhara in Neon Genesis Evangelion, Sagara Sousuke in the Full Metal Panic series, and Kenichi Shirahama in Shijou Saikyou no Deshi Kenichi.
